summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of cardamom export ecommerce MVP. All backend APIs, frontend UI components, mobile responsiveness, and integrations working perfectly. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (GET /api/)
Backend products endpoint (GET /api/products) - returns 4 cardamom varieties
Backend individual product endpoint (GET /api/products/{id})
Backend contact form submission (POST /api/contact)
Backend contact form validation
Frontend homepage loading with hero section 'The Queen of Spices'
Frontend navigation bar (Home, Products, Contact links)
Frontend features section with 3 feature cards
Frontend about section with plantation image
Frontend products preview section with 3 products in Tetris grid
Frontend products page displaying all 4 cardamom varieties
Frontend contact page with complete contact form
Frontend contact form submission with success toast
Frontend footer with 'Get in Touch' heading
Mobile responsive navigation menu
Mobile responsive design across all pages
Image loading for hero and all 4 product images
Typography implementation (Playfair Display serif font)
Color scheme implementation (bone white background, forest green primary)
Frontend-backend integration for product data
Frontend-backend integration for contact form submission
